title: Rich Creamy Dutch Potato Gratin
description: A hearty and comforting Dutch dish featuring creamy double cream and salt-baked potatoes, perfect for a romantic dinner.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the sliced potatoes and salt, tossing to coat evenly.
Let the potatoes sit for 10 minutes to allow the salt to draw out excess moisture.
Rinse the potatoes under cold running water to remove excess salt.
In a large saucepan, combine the double cream, butter, black pepper, and garlic powder, heating over medium heat until the butter has melted.
In a greased 9x13 inch baking dish, create a layer of potatoes, followed by a layer of the cream mixture, and finally a sprinkle of gruyere cheese.
Repeat the layering process until all ingredients have been used, finishing with a layer of cheese on top.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 20 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the potatoes are tender.
Remove the dish from the oven and sprinkle with chopped parsley before serving.
